title: prunus × oneyamensis
intro: Prunus × oneyamensis, also known as the Chinese apricot, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Prunus genus, derived from the cross between Prunus armeniaca and Prunus mume. The medicinal properties of Prunus × oneyamensis include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Prunus × oneyamensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and exhibit antiseptic properties, making it useful in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of Prunus × oneyamensis typically involve drying the fruit or bark to make teas, infusions, or decoctions that can be used to treat various health conditions.
